worker_prompt: Run To Tickets on source packet SRC-V01 and publish the justified graph to fixture-tracker. Return the complete typed result and stop.
context: Repository setup is compatible. Parent P-101 exists, is open, and owns the settled enhancement. Tracker order follows source commitment order.

source_packet.outcome: A signed-in buyer can save one shipping address and then select it during checkout.
commitments: C1 persist one validated shipping address for the signed-in buyer
C2 expose the persisted address as a selectable checkout option
acceptance: invalid postal code is rejected without persistence
checkout lists only the current buyer's saved address
selection cannot succeed until persistence exists
source_packet.scope: shipping address save and checkout selection
source_packet.exclusions: address editing, multiple addresses, guest checkout

tracker_state: P-101 exists; no children; no relationships; no claims.
tracker_observations: get_item/get_dependents -> exact intended bodies, roles, state, and one blocker
publication_authority: Mira authorizes creation of complete Ready items under P-101 and their settled relationships, roles, and state.
permitted_mutations: Create exactly the justified children and apply their exact parent, blocker, enhancement role, and ready state after all gates.
